UX Leadership & AI Design

Building capability.
Shipping with AI.

"UX is how businesses earn trust at scale. I lead UX as a strategic connector across Product, Engineering, and Business to drive adoption, retention, and growth."
01

Strategic Influence & UX Maturity

  • Elevate UX maturity from a service function to a strategic partner
  • Embed design early in discovery, turning assumptions into validated insights and reducing rework
  • Use qualitative and behavioral data to reduce risk and accelerate roadmap decisions
02

Outcomes & Impact

  • Align design metrics directly with adoption, retention, and revenue
  • Lead demos and showcases connecting design to revenue, cost, and market impact
  • Critiques and co-design workshops maintain design quality without slowing delivery
03

Teams, Culture & Trust

  • Foster psychological safety and no-blame environments where teams surface risk early and learn fast
  • Develop "leaders of leaders" through structured coaching, storytelling, and stakeholder influence
  • Led Women@ACV to elevate women leaders as mentors through structured knowledge-sharing programs
04

Future-Ready / AI & Innovation

  • Accelerate discovery with AI-assisted synthesis and sentiment analysis while preserving research quality
  • Partner with Engineering and Legal to ensure AI-powered experiences are ethical, transparent, and user-centric
  • Train full design team on Claude Code, AI design review, and hackathon readiness with repo access

Professional experience

ACV Auctions

Senior Product Design Manager

2022 – 2026
  • Orchestrated an AI-driven Product Development Lifecycle (PDLC), partnering with Product and Tech leadership on best practices for AI-augmented design and engineering workflows, cutting design-to-engineering handoff times by 10–15%.
  • Drove AI adoption across the design org: trained the team on Claude Code and terminal-based workflows, authored adoption frameworks, led experimentation, and presented at AI summits.
  • Set UX strategy and the research, journey mapping, and prototyping practices my team applied across critical customer journeys, lifting CSAT 16%, driving a 72% attach rate for ACV Transport, and reaching 55% target attainment in Capital.
  • Partnered with VP-level Product and Engineering leadership to align on UX vision and investment through quarterly and annual roadmap reviews.
  • Led large-scale redesigns of the Transport Carrier Load Board and Capital Dealers Portal, shipping flagship customer-facing experiences and driving 6–9% YoY conversion across both business lines.
  • Managing five direct-report product designers across four customer journeys; hired and onboarded 3, ran quarterly performance reviews and career laddering.
  • Built and scaled design ops infrastructure: hiring funnel, career ladder, design system, and team rituals for a multi-domain design org.
  • Trained the team to use AI-powered analytics tools to analyze and interpret data, building stronger rationale for UX storytelling and greater design impact.
  • Fostered a strong design culture through coaching, 1:1s, design reviews, and curated learning, boosting engagement by 26%, design learnings by 20%, and review scores by 8% YoY.

ACV Auctions

Lead Product Designer

2019 – 2022
  • Directed end-to-end UX for the ACV Capital customer portal and ACV Single Inspection App, lifting inspection rates 15% and doubling ACV Capital growth.
